Hi there,
I posted on Air Duct cleaning and Vent Cleaning services and needing customers to fill the truck for the special November package. We charge a single flat fee for our services. It's a good step to ward off and kill germs of many viruses these days and also provide fresh, healthy air to breathe.
Our promise to you, 100% satisfaction is our guarantee! We want you to be delighted with our service. If something chose you receive is not up to par, we fix it.
BENEFITS INCLUDES:
• Unlimited conduits and events will be clean.
•Cleaning of duct and vent
• No connection fees.
• No hidden fees
• No ventilation costs
•Hurricane compressed air whip system.
MYTH: I just bought a new house, so my ducts are clean!
FALSE: In most cases, duct work is one of the first items installed and not sealed. Dust from drywall and other building materials ends up in your duct work, which can negatively impact your heating and ventilation system.
Thanks..
